name: magician
description: Full-stack SDLC plugin with dynamic project inspection, team memory, self-learning, and parallel agent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous SDLC workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Magician to inspect projects, design features, create TDD implementation plans, coordinate parallel agents, verify changes, review code, and ship pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Set up Magician in this workspace.
Design and ship this feature with Magician.
Verify this branch before opening a PR.
